review_criteria: Verify the ratification packet includes M3 closure evidence (summary, artifact list, review decisions, and a scope boundary note).
Verify the packet includes M4 closure evidence (summary, artifact list, review decisions, and explicitly explains why it was entered when ratification was pending).
Verify the packet includes an M5 deviation note clarifying who approved entering M5, why continuing was compliant, and whether a reviewer checked the deviation.
Verify the packet includes a state continuity table mapping dispatch.json to iteration-state.json and their corresponding decision artifacts.
Verify the packet includes a ratification recommendation explicitly stating what to ratify and whether any state rollbacks are recommended.
Verify NO implementation files, workflow semantics, or directories are modified by this document.
